original_query: select   i_item_id  ,i_item_desc  ,s_store_id  ,s_store_name  ,sum(ss_net_profit) as store_sales_profit  ,sum(sr_net_loss) as store_returns_loss  ,sum(cs_net_profit) as catalog_sales_profit  from  store_sales  ,store_returns  ,catalog_sales  ,date_dim d1  ,date_dim d2  ,date_dim d3  ,store  ,item  where  d1.d_moy = 8  and d1.d_year = 2001  and d1.d_date_sk = ss_sold_date_sk  and i_item_sk = ss_item_sk  and s_store_sk = ss_store_sk  and ss_customer_sk = sr_customer_sk  and ss_item_sk = sr_item_sk  and ss_ticket_number = sr_ticket_number  and sr_returned_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk  and d2.d_moy               between 8 and  8 + 2  and d2.d_year              = 2001  and sr_customer_sk = cs_bill_customer_sk  and sr_item_sk = cs_item_sk  and cs_sold_date_sk = d3.d_date_sk  and d3.d_moy               between 8 and  8 + 2  and d3.d_year              = 2001  group by  i_item_id  ,i_item_desc  ,s_store_id  ,s_store_name  order by  i_item_id  ,i_item_desc  ,s_store_id  ,s_store_name  limit 100;
rewritten_query: select   i_item_id  ,i_item_desc  ,s_store_id  ,s_store_name  ,sum(ss_net_profit) as store_sales_profit  ,sum(sr_net_loss) as store_returns_loss  ,sum(cs_net_profit) as catalog_sales_profit  from  store_sales  ,store_returns  ,catalog_sales  ,date_dim d1  ,date_dim d2  ,date_dim d3  ,store  ,item  where  d1.d_moy = 8  and d1.d_year = 2001  and d1.d_date_sk = ss_sold_date_sk  and i_item_sk = ss_item_sk  and s_store_sk = ss_store_sk  and ss_customer_sk = sr_customer_sk  and ss_item_sk = sr_item_sk  and ss_ticket_number = sr_ticket_number  and sr_returned_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk  and d2.d_moy               between 8 and  8 + 2  and d2.d_year              = 2001  and sr_customer_sk = cs_bill_customer_sk  and sr_item_sk = cs_item_sk  and cs_sold_date_sk = d3.d_date_sk  and d3.d_moy               between 8 and  8 + 2  and d3.d_year              = 2001  group by  i_item_id  ,i_item_desc  ,s_store_id  ,s_store_name  order by  i_item_id  ,i_item_desc  ,s_store_id  ,s_store_name  limit 100;

original_query: select   i_item_id  ,i_item_desc  ,s_store_id  ,s_store_name  ,min(ss_net_profit) as store_sales_profit  ,min(sr_net_loss) as store_returns_loss  ,min(cs_net_profit) as catalog_sales_profit  from  store_sales  ,store_returns  ,catalog_sales  ,date_dim d1  ,date_dim d2  ,date_dim d3  ,store  ,item  where  d1.d_moy = 6  and d1.d_year = 2002  and d1.d_date_sk = ss_sold_date_sk  and i_item_sk = ss_item_sk  and s_store_sk = ss_store_sk  and ss_customer_sk = sr_customer_sk  and ss_item_sk = sr_item_sk  and ss_ticket_number = sr_ticket_number  and sr_returned_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk  and d2.d_moy               between 6 and  6 + 2  and d2.d_year              = 2002  and sr_customer_sk = cs_bill_customer_sk  and sr_item_sk = cs_item_sk  and cs_sold_date_sk = d3.d_date_sk  and d3.d_moy               between 6 and  6 + 2  and d3.d_year              = 2002  group by  i_item_id  ,i_item_desc  ,s_store_id  ,s_store_name  order by  i_item_id  ,i_item_desc  ,s_store_id  ,s_store_name  limit 100;
rewritten_query:
WITH filtered_sales AS (
    SELECT ss.*
    FROM store_sales ss
    JOIN date_dim d1 ON d1.d_date_sk = ss.ss_sold_date_sk 
    WHERE d1.d_moy = 6 AND d1.d_year = 2002
),
filtered_returns AS (
    SELECT sr.*
    FROM store_returns sr
    JOIN date_dim d2 ON d2.d_date_sk = sr.sr_returned_date_sk 
    WHERE d2.d_moy BETWEEN 6 AND 8 AND d2.d_year = 2002
),
filtered_catalog AS (
    SELECT cs.*
    FROM catalog_sales cs
    JOIN date_dim d3 ON d3.d_date_sk = cs.cs_sold_date_sk 
    WHERE d3.d_moy BETWEEN 6 AND 8 AND d3.d_year = 2002
)
SELECT 
    i.i_item_id,
    i.i_item_desc,
    s.s_store_id,
    s.s_store_name,
    MIN(ss.ss_net_profit) AS store_sales_profit,
    MIN(sr.sr_net_loss) AS store_returns_loss,
    MIN(cs.cs_net_profit) AS catalog_sales_profit
FROM filtered_sales ss
JOIN item i ON i.i_item_sk = ss.ss_item_sk
JOIN store s ON s.s_store_sk = ss.ss_store_sk
JOIN filtered_returns sr ON ss.ss_customer_sk = sr.sr_customer_sk
    AND ss.ss_item_sk = sr.sr_item_sk
    AND ss.ss_ticket_number = sr.sr_ticket_number
JOIN filtered_catalog cs ON sr.sr_customer_sk = cs.cs_bill_customer_sk
    AND sr.sr_item_sk = cs.cs_item_sk
GROUP BY 
    i.i_item_id,
    i.i_item_desc,
    s.s_store_id,
    s.s_store_name
ORDER BY 
    i.i_item_id,
    i.i_item_desc,
    s.s_store_id,
    s.s_store_name
LIMIT 100;

rewrite_suggestion.nave_suggestion: Replaced implicit joins with explicit JOIN syntax to make the relationships between tables clearer and help the optimizer understand the query structure better.
Moved date filtering conditions from the WHERE clause into the JOIN ON clauses to allow the optimizer to filter rows earlier in the execution process.
Simplified the BETWEEN expression for date range filtering while maintaining the same logic (d2.d_moy between 6 and 6 + 2 was converted to d2.d_moy BETWEEN 6 AND 8).

original_query: select   i_item_id  ,i_item_desc  ,s_store_id  ,s_store_name  ,stddev_samp(ss_net_profit) as store_sales_profit  ,stddev_samp(sr_net_loss) as store_returns_loss  ,stddev_samp(cs_net_profit) as catalog_sales_profit  from  store_sales  ,store_returns  ,catalog_sales  ,date_dim d1  ,date_dim d2  ,date_dim d3  ,store  ,item  where  d1.d_moy = 4  and d1.d_year = 2001  and d1.d_date_sk = ss_sold_date_sk  and i_item_sk = ss_item_sk  and s_store_sk = ss_store_sk  and ss_customer_sk = sr_customer_sk  and ss_item_sk = sr_item_sk  and ss_ticket_number = sr_ticket_number  and sr_returned_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk  and d2.d_moy               between 4 and  4 + 2  and d2.d_year              = 2001  and sr_customer_sk = cs_bill_customer_sk  and sr_item_sk = cs_item_sk  and cs_sold_date_sk = d3.d_date_sk  and d3.d_moy               between 4 and  4 + 2  and d3.d_year              = 2001  group by  i_item_id  ,i_item_desc  ,s_store_id  ,s_store_name  order by  i_item_id  ,i_item_desc  ,s_store_id  ,s_store_name  limit 100;
rewritten_query: select   i_item_id  ,i_item_desc  ,s_store_id  ,s_store_name  ,stddev_samp(ss_net_profit) as store_sales_profit  ,stddev_samp(sr_net_loss) as store_returns_loss  ,stddev_samp(cs_net_profit) as catalog_sales_profit  from  store_sales  ,store_returns  ,catalog_sales  ,date_dim d1  ,date_dim d2  ,date_dim d3  ,store  ,item  where  d1.d_moy = 4  and d1.d_year = 2001  and d1.d_date_sk = ss_sold_date_sk  and i_item_sk = ss_item_sk  and s_store_sk = ss_store_sk  and ss_customer_sk = sr_customer_sk  and ss_item_sk = sr_item_sk  and ss_ticket_number = sr_ticket_number  and sr_returned_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk  and d2.d_moy               between 4 and  4 + 2  and d2.d_year              = 2001  and sr_customer_sk = cs_bill_customer_sk  and sr_item_sk = cs_item_sk  and cs_sold_date_sk = d3.d_date_sk  and d3.d_moy               between 4 and  4 + 2  and d3.d_year              = 2001  group by  i_item_id  ,i_item_desc  ,s_store_id  ,s_store_name  order by  i_item_id  ,i_item_desc  ,s_store_id  ,s_store_name  limit 100;
